fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Virginia Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity virginia, how to transfer pharmacist license to virginia, pharmacist compact virginia, virginia pharmacist endorsement application

board.name: Virginia Board of Pharmacy
board.mailing_address:
Virginia Board of Pharmacy
Perimeter Center
9960 Mayland Drive, Suite 300
Henrico, VA 23233-1463

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in Virginia.

steps.title: Apply Online via DHP Portal
steps.description: Register for an account on the DHP Online Licensing Portal, complete the 'Application for Pharmacist by Examination,' and submit the required application fee.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from your ACPE-accredited pharmacy program to be sent directly from the institution to the Virginia Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Register for NABP Exams
steps.description: Register with the National Association of Boards of Pharmacy (NABP) to take both the North American Pharmacist Licensure Examination (NAPLEX) and the Virginia Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE). Ensure your official scores are directed to the Virginia Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Pass NAPLEX & MPJE
steps.description: Successfully pass both the NAPLEX and the Virginia MPJE with a satisfactory score as determined by the Board.

steps.title: License Issuance
steps.description: Upon successful completion of all requirements, including passing scores and documentation verification, the Virginia Board of Pharmacy will issue your Pharmacist license.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a Virginia pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does Virginia have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in Virginia. To work in Virginia, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to Virginia?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in Virginia
hero.dek: To apply for a Pharmacist license in Virginia, you must create an account and submit your application through the DHP Online Licensing Portal.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity

official_links.registration_steps: On the DHP Online Licensing Portal, click 'Register a New Account' to create your user ID and password, then log in to access and submit your application.
